college_name: College of International Transport and Logistics
parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport

international: AACSB (First accredited college in International Transport, Logistics and Supply Chain Management)
national: National Authority for Quality Assurance and Accreditation of Education (NAQAAE)

degree_history.original_department: Management and Economics – College of Maritime Transport

departments: Logistics and International Trade Management Department
Logistics and Supply Chain Management Department

leadership_history.role: Dean – Graduate School of Business Administration, Alexandria

leadership_history.role: Secretary General, Union of Arab Chambers

leadership_history.name: Prof. Gehan Saleh

current_dean.name: Dr. Sara El Gazzar
current_dean.title: Dean of the College of International Transport and Logistics

college_identity.description: Educational center of excellence in logistics, supply chain management, international transport, and trade in the Middle East and North Africa.
college_identity.student_body: Students from Egypt, Arab countries, and Africa
college_identity.teaching_approach: Applied, multidisciplinary, continuously updated to meet global business needs

mission: Contributing to the social and economic development of the Arab region by offering distinguished change agents qualified through comprehensive educational programs, high calibre faculty, and centers of excellence in research, training, and consultancies while strictly committed to the highest levels of quality.
vision: To be a regional and international center of excellence in logistics, supply chain management, and international transport education, research, and professional development.

industry_and_research.international_collaboration: Programs developed in cooperation with UK universities

focus: Strategic importance of logistics and transport to Egypt
Egypt as a global trade hub
